en.name: Queens
en.desc: Place queens on a colorful grid
en.description: Queens is a logic puzzle where you place exactly one queen in each row, column, and colored region of a grid. The catch? Queens cannot touch each other — not even diagonally! Inspired by Star Battle and popularized by LinkedIn, this addictive puzzle tests your logical deduction skills with grid sizes from 5×5 (beginner) to 12×12 (master). Every puzzle has a unique solution that can be found through pure logic — no guessing required!
en.objectives: Place exactly one queen in each row, each column, and each colored region. Queens must never touch each other, including diagonally. Use logical deduction to find the unique valid arrangement.
en.howToPlay: Click cells to place queens. Each row, column, and colored region needs exactly 1 queen. Queens cannot touch diagonally. Use X markers to track impossible cells.

rules.controls: Click a cell to cycle: Empty → 👑 Queen → ✕ Marker → Empty. Right-click to cycle in reverse. Use markers to note cells where queens cannot go.
mechanics: Each row must contain exactly 1 queen
Each column must contain exactly 1 queen
Each colored region must contain exactly 1 queen
Queens cannot touch horizontally, vertically, or diagonally
Every puzzle has exactly one valid solution
features: 7 Grid Sizes — From 5×5 beginner to 12×12 master
Daily Challenge — A new puzzle every day for each grid size
Region Highlighting — Thick borders show colored regions clearly
Count Indicators — Row and column queen counts update in real time
Auto Stats — Track your best times and streaks per grid size

tips: Start with the smallest regions — they have the fewest valid queen positions
Place an X marker on every cell diagonally adjacent to a placed queen
If a row or column has only one available cell, the queen must go there
Work through constraints systematically rather than guessing

faq.question: What is the Queens game?
faq.answer: Queens is a logic puzzle where you place exactly one queen in each row, column, and colored region of a grid. Queens cannot touch each other, even diagonally. It's similar to Star Battle but with exactly one piece per unit instead of two.

faq.question: Is Queens free to play?
faq.answer: Yes! Queens is completely free to play online. No download, registration, or payment required. Just pick a grid size and start solving puzzles instantly.

faq.question: What grid size should I start with?
faq.answer: Start with the 5×5 grid to learn the basic rules and strategies. Once comfortable, progress to 7×7 and 8×8. Larger grids (10×10, 11×11, 12×12) offer increasingly complex challenges for experienced players.

faq.question: How is Queens different from Star Battle?
faq.answer: Queens uses exactly 1 piece per row/column/region, while Star Battle uses 2. This makes Queens more accessible for beginners while still offering deep challenges at larger grid sizes. The diagonal touching rule is the same in both.

faq.question: Do I need to guess to solve puzzles?
faq.answer: No! Every Queens puzzle has a unique solution that can be found through pure logical deduction. If you're guessing, try looking for more constrained cells first — especially in small regions or nearly-complete rows.

faq.question: Can I play Queens on mobile?
faq.answer: Yes! Queens is fully responsive and works on phones, tablets, and desktops. Touch controls make it easy to place queens and markers on any device.

zh.name: 皇后棋
zh.desc: 在彩色网格中放置皇后
zh.description: 皇后棋是一款逻辑谜题，你需要在网格的每行、每列和每个彩色区域中各放置恰好一个皇后。关键规则：皇后之间不能互相接触，包括对角线方向！从5×5（入门）到12×12（大师），7种网格尺寸满足不同水平玩家。每个谜题都有唯一解，完全可以通过逻辑推理找到——无需猜测！
zh.objectives: 在每行、每列和每个彩色区域中恰好放置一个皇后。皇后之间不能互相接触，包括对角线。用逻辑推理找到唯一的正确摆放方式。
zh.howToPlay: 点击格子放置皇后。每行、每列和每个彩色区域各需要1个皇后。皇后不能对角线相邻。用✕标记不可能的位置。

rules.controls: 点击格子循环切换：空 → 👑 皇后 → ✕ 标记 → 空。右键反向切换。用标记记录皇后不能放的位置。
mechanics: 每行必须恰好包含1个皇后
每列必须恰好包含1个皇后
每个彩色区域必须恰好包含1个皇后
皇后不能水平、垂直或对角线接触
每个谜题恰好有一个有效解决方案
features: 7种网格尺寸 — 从5×5入门到12×12大师
每日挑战 — 每天每种尺寸都有新谜题
区域高亮 — 粗边框清晰显示彩色区域
计数指示器 — 实时显示每行每列的皇后数
自动统计 — 追踪每种尺寸的最佳时间和连胜

tips: 从最小的区域开始——它们的有效位置最少
在已放置皇后的对角线相邻格子放置✕标记
如果某行或某列只有一个可用格子，皇后必须放那里
系统性地处理约束条件，而不是猜测

faq.question: 什么是皇后棋？
faq.answer: 皇后棋是一款逻辑谜题，你需要在网格的每行、每列和每个彩色区域中各放置一个皇后。皇后之间不能互相接触，包括对角线。它类似星星大战，但每个单位只放1个棋子而不是2个。

faq.question: 皇后棋免费吗？
faq.answer: 是的！皇后棋完全免费在线游玩。无需下载、注册或付费。选择网格尺寸即可开始解谜。

faq.question: 应该从什么尺寸开始？
faq.answer: 建议从5×5网格开始学习基本规则和策略。熟练后可以尝试7×7和8×8。更大的网格（10×10、11×11、12×12）为有经验的玩家提供更复杂的挑战。

faq.question: 皇后棋和星星大战有什么区别？
faq.answer: 皇后棋每行/列/区域放1个棋子，星星大战放2个。这让皇后棋更适合新手入门，但大尺寸网格同样有深度挑战。两者的对角线接触规则相同。

faq.question: 需要猜测才能解谜吗？
faq.answer: 不需要！每个皇后棋谜题都有唯一解，可以通过纯逻辑推理找到。如果你在猜测，试着先找约束更多的格子——特别是小区域或几乎完成的行。

faq.question: 手机上可以玩吗？
faq.answer: 可以！皇后棋完全响应式，支持手机、平板和桌面设备。触摸控制让你在任何设备上都能轻松放置皇后和标记。
